title: CAMPS - 211info
text: YMCA OF MID-WILLAMETTE CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth camps. 3201 Pacific Boulevard SW Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 926-4488 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 926-4488 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, and Marion Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 5am-9pm, Friday 5:30am-7pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-1pm Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CLUB Y LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - NON-SCHOOL DAY PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
